alerts.coversBody: Steam games fetch the artwork automatically. For Epic and manual profiles, click "Cover" on the game card.

search.placeholder: Search or name for manual add…

empty.tryAnother: Try a different name or add a game manually.
empty.scanOrAddPrefix: Click "Scan" or "Add" to specify the installation folder. For Subnautica 2 config:

sections.unityHint: Presets modify boot.config in the *_Data folder.
sections.authorHint: Presets curated by the app author — a separate config format (Forza: UserConfigSelections + media).
sections.otherHint: Engine not detected — automatic ini presets are unavailable. ReShade and launching from GSM are available.
